name: SML Isuzu Limited
summary: SML Isuzu Limited manufactures and sells commercial vehicles and related parts primarily in India and internationally. The company's products include trucks and buses. It also provides special applications, cargo, and passenger vehicles. The company offers its products through dealers. The company was formerly known as Swaraj Mazda Ltd. and changed its name to SML Isuzu Limited in 2011. SML Isuzu Limited was incorporated in 1983 and is based in Chandigarh, India.
